title: knautia arvensis var. centauroides
intro: Knautia arvensis var. centauroides, also known as Field Scabious Centaurea, is a plant species in the family Dipsacaceae, characterized by its pink to purple flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis var. centauroides include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and potentially alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
